driveway_headless.definition: ! rtph264depay ! h264parse ! avdec_h264 ! videoconvert ! fakesink sync=true

detector_example.definition: ! rtph264depay ! h264parse ! avdec_h264 ! videoconvert ! gvadetect model=/opt/models/person-detection.xml device=CPU ! gvawatermark ! videoconvert ! autovideosink

snapshot_to_file.definition: num-buffers=1 ! rtph264depay ! h264parse ! avdec_h264 ! videoconvert ! jpegenc ! filesink location=/tmp/snapshot.jpg
